suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a note that IPC socket path is intentionally unused for provider-backed agent sessions (Pi/Droid/ACP). Currently ipc_socket_path_override is silently discarded in the provider path, which is correct but not explicitly documented.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both agent-type-routing-mobileclient and ffi-agent-type-parameter reviews noted ipc_socket_path_override being unused in provider path. Hardcoded None in run_provider_ssh_connect().
